ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strain used in the experiment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., H2O2 treatment, gene expression) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed, paused) */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab where the experiment is conducted */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the experiment data is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strains" (
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strain */,
  "strain_name" TEXT /* Name of the strain */,
  "characteristics" TEXT /* Characteristics of the strain (e.g., growth pattern, gene expression) */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the microorganism */,
  "genetic_modification" TEXT /* Genetic modifications (e.g., knockouts, overexpressions) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the strain (e.g., lab-created, purchased from a supplier) */,
  "accession_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier from a biological database (e.g., NCBI, GenBank) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "h2o2_treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each H2O2 treatment */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of H2O2 used in the treatment */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the H2O2 treatment */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature during the treatment */,
  "pH" TEXT /* pH level during the treatment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "od600nm_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OD600nm reading */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the reading belongs to */,
  "od600nm" REAL /* OD600nm value */,
  "dilution" INTEGER /* Dilution factor used for the reading */,
  "timepoint" TEXT /* Time at which the reading was taken */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the reading */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_od600nm_readings_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colony_counts" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each colony count */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the count belongs to */,
  "white" INTEGER /* Number of white colonies */,
  "black" INTEGER /* Number of black colonies */,
  "halfblack" INTEGER /* Number of half-black colonies */,
  "quatblack" INTEGER /* Number of quarter-black colonies */,
  "3quatblack" INTEGER /* Number of 3-quarter-black colonies */,
  "quatquatblack" INTEGER /* Number of quarter-quarter-black colonies */,
  "other" INTEGER /* Number of other colonies */,
  "timepoint" TEXT /* Time at which the count was taken */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the count */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colony_counts_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, lab technician, principal investigator) */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab the user is associated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number for better tracking */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., temperature, pH) */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the condition */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the condition value */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the condition */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the result belongs to */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result (e.g., growth rate, gene expression) */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the result */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the result value */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the result */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the lab */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lab's focus and capabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the principal investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal investigator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the principal investigator */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab the investigator is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_principal_investigators_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id")
)
